description: This episode of Solana Bytes discusses non-transferable (soul-bound) tokens and their applications in digital collectibles, including certificates and achievements. It explains the non-transferable mint extension introduced by Token 22, allowing tokens to remain exclusive to individuals while providing flexibility to burn unwanted assets [t=0:24-1:12].
topic_summary: Exploration of non-transferable tokens on Solana, focusing on their implementation and use cases in digital assets.
